mapper.select: SELECT u.id AS userId, u.user_type AS userType, u.account_status AS accountStatus, u.full_name AS fullName, u.email, u.student_no AS studentNo, ai.credential_hash AS credentialHash, ai.identity_type AS identityType FROM auth_identities ai JOIN users u ON u.id = ai.user_id WHERE ai.identity_key = #{identityKey} AND ai.identity_type IN ('email_password','student_no_password','employee_no_password') AND u.deleted_at IS NULL LIMIT 1
SELECT r.role_code FROM user_roles ur JOIN roles r ON r.id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND r.role_status = 'active' AND (ur.effective_to IS NULL OR ur.effective_to > NOW())

SELECT DISTINCT p.permission_code FROM user_roles ur JOIN roles r ON r.id = ur.role_id JOIN role_permissions rp ON rp.role_id = r.id JOIN permissions p ON p.id = rp.permission_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND r.role_status = 'active' AND (ur.effective_to IS NULL OR ur.effective_to > NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET last_login_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{userId}
